generated_categories.name: Default Behavior Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the isCurrency validator, ensuring proper handling of valid and invalid currency strings with standard formatting.

generated_categories.name: Symbol Requirement
generated_categories.description: Validates the behavior when the `require_symbol` option is set to true, ensuring that currency strings must include a symbol.

generated_categories.name: Negative Value Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the handling of negative values with different configurations, including disallowing negatives and allowing parentheses for negatives.

generated_categories.name: Decimal Requirement
generated_categories.description: Ensures proper validation of currency strings when the `require_decimal` option is set to true, requiring the presence of a decimal point.

generated_categories.name: Decimal Precision
generated_categories.description: Validates the behavior of the `digits_after_decimal` option, ensuring that only specific numbers of digits are allowed after the decimal point.
